title: epacris glacialis
intro: Epacris glacialis, also known as the alpine heath, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. Native to New Zealand, it has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Epacris glacialis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its therapeutic effects.
